display_text: Lion is a ranged Intelligence hero with a 600 attack range, a base attack time of 1.7 seconds, and starting attributes of 18 Strength, 15 Agility, and 19 Intelligence. His base movement speed is 290. His stat distribution and attack type are typical for a ranged support caster, offering average durability and low physical damage output.
search_text: Lion base stats attack type ranged attack rate 1.7 BAT strength agility intelligence

display_text: Lion has two Facets. Essence Eater causes Mana Drain to deal damage equal to 50% of the mana stolen. This facet increases Lion's kill threat and harass potential in lane. Fist of Death gives Lion a strong, cleaving melee attack for 3 seconds after casting Finger of Death, fundamentally changing his right-click pattern during fights and making physical damage builds more viable. Choose Essence Eater for a traditional, magic-damage-focused caster. Choose Fist of Death to transform into a burst-fighter hybrid, especially effective against illusion or summon-heavy lineups.
search_text: Lion facets Essence Eater Mana Drain damage 50% stolen mana Fist of Death cleave melee attack after Finger of Death

display_text: In lane, Lion's primary goal is to secure kills for his core using his potent level 1-2 combo. Earth Spike (650 range, 105 damage, 1.3s stun) is a strong starting skill. Follow up with Hex at level 2 to extend the disable. Use Mana Drain strategically to burn the enemy's mana pool, increasing the slow effect to 34.5% when they are OOM. His low base damage makes last-hitting difficult; focus on spellcasting. Positioning is key due to his low base armor and health pool.
search_text: Lion laning Earth Spike stun Hex Mana Drain slow mana burn support kill lane

display_text: Lion's first major power spike is Level 6 with Finger of Death (600 damage). His next spike is Level 7 with maxed Earth Spike (300 damage, 2.2s stun). Level 12 with the +10% Mana Drain Slow talent and maxed Hex (3.2s duration) improves his control. The Level 20 talent (+250 AoE Hex) is a massive teamfight spike. Level 25 offers a choice between enormous utility (+600 Earth Spike range) or a potent area disable (+250 AoE Hex). Item spikes: Blink Dagger enables initiation, Aghanim's Scepter upgrades Finger of Death to a 900 damage AOE nuke.
search_text: Lion power spikes level 6 Finger of Death level 7 Earth Spike level 12 talent level 20 AoE Hex Blink Dagger Aghanim's Scepter

display_text: Lion is countered by heroes with BKB-piercing control that can catch him during his long cast animations (e.g., Faceless Void's Chronosphere). High mobility heroes (Storm Spirit, Queen of Pain) can dodge his linear Earth Spike. Lotus Orb and Linken's Sphere block his single-target disables and Finger of Death. Heroes with strong dispels (Slark, Legion Commander) can remove Hex. Instant silences prevent him from casting his combo. Illusion heroes are tough if he lacks the Fist of Death facet.
search_text: counter Lion BKB piercing stun silence mobility dodge Earth Spike Linken's Sphere Lotus Orb dispel Hex

display_text: Lion's core build is defined by mobility and mana. Tranquil Boots provide sustain and movement speed. Blink Dagger is an absolute necessity to land multi-hero Earth Spikes and position for key Hexes. Aghanim's Scepter is the primary damage and farming upgrade, turning Finger of Death into an AOE nuke. These items are non-negotiable for a core Lion playstyle.
search_text: Lion core items Tranquil Boots Blink Dagger Aghanim's Scepter essential

display_text: In teamfights, Lion's role is to initiate or counter-initiate with Blink Dagger + Earth Spike (which does NOT pierce BKB) to stun multiple heroes. He must instantly Hex (Does NOT pierce BKB) the most dangerous enemy core or save-caster. He should use Mana Drain to lock down and slow a key target, preventing them from using spells. His ultimate, Finger of Death (Does NOT pierce BKB), is used to execute a low-health priority target. Positioning is critical; he is fragile and must avoid being focused.
search_text: Lion teamfight role initiator Blink Earth Spike multi-hero stun Hex disable target Finger of Death execute

display_text: Earth Spike: Lion hurls a target enemy unit into the air, dealing 105/170/235/300 damage and stunning them for 1.3/1.6/1.9/2.2 seconds. The projectile travels in a line at 2800 speed with a width of 140, hitting units in its path. It has a 650 cast range and a 14/13/12/11 second cooldown. This ability does NOT pierce BKB.
search_text: Lion Q Earth Spike stun damage 105 170 235 300 duration 1.3 1.6 1.9 2.2 cast range 650 cooldown 14 13 12 11 linear projectile

display_text: Hex: Lion transforms an enemy unit into a harmless beast for 2/2.4/2.8/3.2 seconds, disabling all special abilities. The hexed unit has a base movement speed of 120. The ability has a 12 second cooldown at max level and instantly destroys illusions. This ability does NOT pierce BKB.
search_text: Lion W Hex disable transform duration 2 2.4 2.8 3.2 cooldown 24 20 16 12 destroys illusions movement speed 120

display_text: Mana Drain: Lion channels, draining 20/40/60/120 mana per second from a target enemy over 5 seconds, slowing them by 15/20/25/30%. If the enemy's mana reaches zero, the slow increases by 15%. Can be channeled on an ally to restore their mana at 50% rate (10/20/30/60 mana per second) and grant them movement speed at 50% rate. The channel breaks if the target moves beyond 1100 range. This ability prevents heroes from going invisible.
search_text: Lion E Mana Drain channel mana steal 20 40 60 120 per second slow 15 20 25 30 increased slow OOM ally restore mana movement speed

display_text: To Hell and Back: A passive ability that grants Lion 20% increased debuff duration and 20 spell amplification for 90 seconds after respawning.
search_text: Lion To Hell and Back passive respawn debuff duration 20 spell amp 20 duration 90 seconds

display_text: Finger of Death: Lion blasts an enemy unit for 600/725/850 magical damage. The damage is applied after a 0.25 second delay. Each time an enemy hero dies within 3 seconds of being affected by Finger of Death, the damage permanently increases by 40.
search_text: Lion R Finger of Death ultimate nuke damage 600 725 850 delay 0.25 stacks per kill 40 damage

display_text: Scenario: Versus High-HP, Low-Magic-Resistance Teams. Lion excels here. His full combo (Earth Spike, Hex, Finger) can delete a single target. Prioritize maxing Finger of Death and rush Aghanim's Scepter to amplify his burst. Your role is to pick off key supports before fights or finish off tanky cores stunned by your team.
search_text: Lion scenario burst magic damage high HP low magic resist Aghanim's Scepter pickoff

display_text: Scenario: Playing from Behind. Without farm, Lion is fragile. Build cheap utility: Force Staff to save allies and yourself, Glimmer Cape to hide during channeling. Use Earth Spike defensively to stop chasers. Your disables (Hex) remain powerful regardless of net worth. Focus on protecting your most farmed core with your disables rather than initiating.
search_text: Lion scenario behind poor Force Staff Glimmer Cape defensive save disable protect core

display_text: Scenario: Versus Illusion/Summon Heroes (Phantom Lancer, Broodmother). The Fist of Death facet becomes mandatory. After casting Finger of Death, you gain a powerful cleaving melee attack for 3 seconds, allowing you to clear illusions quickly. Itemize for survivability (BKB, Shiva's Guard) to survive in melee range and utilize the cleave.
search_text: Lion scenario illusions summons Phantom Lancer Broodmother Fist of Death facet cleave melee attack

display_text: Scenario: Need for Early Roshan Control. Lion's Hex is one of the longest-duration disables at level 1 (2 seconds). Coordinate with your team to use Hex on Roshan to lock him down, allowing your Ursa or Troll Warlord to deal damage safely. Mana Drain can also be used on Roshan to slow his attack speed.
search_text: Lion scenario Roshan control Hex disable duration Mana Drain slow

display_text: Level 10 Talents: +10% Mana Drain Slow vs +20 Movement Speed. Choose the Mana Drain Slow talent if you are frequently skirmishing and the slow is crucial for securing kills. Choose the Movement Speed talent if you need better positioning for initiations or are struggling to escape ganks, as Lion lacks mobility.
search_text: Lion talent level 10 Mana Drain Slow 10 Movement Speed 20

display_text: Level 15 Talents: -2.5s Hex Cooldown vs +15% To Hell And Back Debuff/Spell Amp. The Hex Cooldown reduction is incredibly strong, lowering its cooldown to 9.5 seconds, allowing near-permanent disable on a single target in fights. The To Hell And Back boost increases your post-respawn spell amp to 35 and debuff duration to 35%, making you more dangerous after dying. Choose Hex cooldown for control, choose To Hell And Back if you are dying frequently.
search_text: Lion talent level 15 Hex Cooldown 2.5 To Hell And Back debuff spell amp 15

display_text: Level 20 Talents: +20 Finger of Death Damage Per Kill vs Earth Spike affects a 30 degree cone. The Finger damage increases your stack gain from 40 to 60 per kill, accelerating your late-game scaling. The Earth Spike cone radically improves your initiation and control, allowing you to stun multiple heroes without perfect positioning. Choose Finger damage if you are snowballing and getting many kills. Choose Earth Spike cone for superior teamfight setup and reliability.
search_text: Lion talent level 20 Finger of Death damage per kill 20 Earth Spike cone 30 degree

display_text: Level 25 Talents: +600 Earth Spike cast range/travel distance vs +250 AoE Hex. The Earth Spike range talent allows you to initiate from extreme safety (1250 range total) and catch fleeing enemies. The AoE Hex is a game-winning teamfight ability, potentially disabling multiple enemy cores. Both are excellent. Choose range if you need pick-off potential and safety. Choose AoE Hex if your team lacks area control and fights are clustered.
search_text: Lion talent level 25 Earth Spike range 600 travel AoE Hex 250 radius
